definitions.text: A group, collection, category or set sharing characteristics or attributes.
examples: The new Ford Fiesta is set to be best in the 'small family' class.
That is one class-A heifer you got there, sonny.

definitions.text: A social grouping, based on job, wealth, etc. In Britain, society is commonly split into three main classes: upper class, middle class and working class.
To assign to a class; to classify.
examples: I would class this with most of the other mediocre works of the period.

definitions.text: To divide into classes, as students; to form into, or place in, a class or classes.
